reference: THE NIGHT IS FULL OF INTERESTING LITTLE SOUNDS THAT WILL NOT AT FIRST LET YOU SLEEP THE RUSTLE OF LITTLE WILD THINGS IN THE HEDGES THE BARKING OF DOGS IN DISTANT FARMS THE CHIRP OF CRICKETS AND THE CROAKING OF FROGS
text: the night is full of interesting little sounds that will not at first let you sleep the rustle of little white things in the hedges the barking of dogs in distant farms the chirp of crickets and the quirking of frogs
